bookSourceComment: 起点有声网 - 听书网站

ruleBookInfo.author:
<js>
var html = java.ajax(baseUrl);
var dd = html.match(/<dd[^>]*>\s*<span>演播[\s\S]*?<\/dd>/);
var result = '';
if(dd) {
    var authors = dd[0].match(/<a[^>]*>([^<]*)<\/a>/g);
    if(authors) {
        result = authors.map(function(a) { return a.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ''); }).join('、');
    }
}
result;
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: h1.book-title@text
ruleBookInfo.tocUrl:
<js>
var html = java.ajax(baseUrl);
var dirUrl = html.match(/href="([^"]*dirurl[^"]*)"/);
if(dirUrl) {
    var dirHtml = java.ajax('https://www.qdysw.com' + dirUrl[1]);
    var bookdir = dirHtml.match(/location\.href="([^"]+)"/);
    if(bookdir) {
        result = 'https://www.qdysw.com' + bookdir[1];
    }
}
result;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var list = [];
var html = java.ajax(baseUrl);
var links = html.match(/href='(\/tingshu\/\d+\/\d+\.html)'/g);
if(links) {
    for(var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) {
        var url = links[i].match(/href='([^']+)'/);
        var name = links[i].match(/>([^<]+)<\/a>/);
        if(url && name) {
            list.push({name: name[1], url: 'https://www.qdysw.com' + url[1]});
        }
    }
}
JSON.stringify(list);
</js>$.[*]

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var audioUrl = '';
var iframeSrc = result.match(/src="(\/player\.html\?nid=\d+&cid=\d+&site=\d+)"/);
if(iframeSrc) {
    var playerUrl = 'https://www.qdysw.com' + iframeSrc[1];
    var playerHtml = java.ajax(playerUrl);
    var m = playerHtml.match(/mp3:'(https?:\/\/[^']+)'/);
    if(m) audioUrl = m[1] + '.mp3';
}
audioUrl;
</js>
